title: Question: width warnings on logical operators

features.name: logical negation on multi-bit operand
features.description: Code should include a unary logical negation operator (!) applied to a multi-bit operand (4-bit wire)

features.name: logical AND on multi-bit operands
features.description: Code should include a binary logical AND operator (&&) applied to two multi-bit operands (4-bit wires)

features.name: logical OR on multi-bit operands
features.description: Code should include a binary logical OR operator (||) applied to two multi-bit operands (4-bit wires)

features.name: reduction operator with logical negation
features.description: Code should include a unary logical negation operator applied to a reduction OR result to explicitly reduce multi-bit to single-bit
